/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sea_battle_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sea_battle_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sea_battle_tests.dir/tests/test_ships.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sea_battle_tests.dir/tests/test_fleet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sea_battle_tests.dir/tests/test_board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sea_battle_tests.dir/tests/test_player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sea_battle_tests.dir/tests/test_game.cpp.o -o sea_battle_tests  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
